title: Moded Lifesteal
description: This modpack is a mix of lifesteal and origins. Kill people and take their hearts and become different beings along the way. Choose an origin to get strengths and weaknesses, but be careful as some origins can be more powerful in comparison to another!
body: This is a mod pack that has over a hundred origins long with lifesteal mod and has a bunch of performance mods along with a mini map.   I hope you enjoy.
